conferences.title: AI & Data Science Summit Europe 2025
conferences.subtitle: Trustworthy Artificial Intelligence for Science and Society
conferences.description: The AI & Data Science Summit Europe 2025 brings together researchers, practitioners, and policymakers to discuss advances in artificial intelligence, machine learning, and data science with a focus on real-world impact in healthcare, climate, and public services.

conferences.title: Global Climate Policy and Energy Transition Summit 2025
conferences.subtitle: From Ambition to Implementation
conferences.description: An interdisciplinary summit focusing on climate change mitigation, adaptation strategies, and renewable energy policy, emphasizing just and equitable transitions in both the Global North and South.

conferences.title: International Conference on Climate Change Adaptation 2026
conferences.subtitle: Resilience, Risk, and Governance
conferences.description: A research-driven conference exploring climate risk assessment, adaptation planning, and the governance of climate resilience in cities, rural regions, and coastal zones.

conferences.title: North American Conference on Machine Learning in Healthcare 2025
conferences.subtitle: Translating Algorithms into Clinical Impact
conferences.description: This conference convenes clinicians, machine learning researchers, and industry partners to discuss the safe and responsible deployment of ML systems in hospitals and public health.

conferences.title: International Symposium on Renewable Energy Policy 2024
conferences.subtitle: Policies for a Net-Zero Future
conferences.description: A policy-oriented symposium examining regulatory frameworks, market design, and governance structures to accelerate renewable energy deployment worldwide.

conferences.title: Data Visualization & Communication in Science 2024
conferences.subtitle: From Exploratory Analysis to Public Engagement
conferences.description: An interdisciplinary conference focused on data visualization best practices, visual storytelling, and tools for communicating complex research to diverse audiences.

conferences.title: African Research Methods Forum 2023
conferences.subtitle: Contextualized Methodologies for African Scholarship
conferences.description: A regional conference spotlighting innovative quantitative and qualitative methodologies tailored to African research contexts in social sciences and public health.

conferences.title: Asia-Pacific Conference on AI Ethics 2026
conferences.subtitle: Governing AI in Diverse Societies
conferences.description: A regional conference examining ethical, legal, and social implications of artificial intelligence deployment across the Asia-Pacific region.

conferences.title: Oceania Marine Science Congress 2025
conferences.subtitle: Oceans, Biodiversity, and Climate
conferences.description: A regional congress presenting cutting-edge marine science with a focus on climate impacts, biodiversity conservation, and indigenous knowledge in Oceania.

conferences.title: Latin American Social Policy Research Conference 2022
conferences.subtitle: Inequality, Welfare, and Development
conferences.description: An academic conference focusing on poverty, inequality, and social protection systems in Latin America.

conferences.title: Open Science Infrastructure Congress 2026
conferences.subtitle: Interoperable Tools for Collaborative Research
conferences.description: A congress dedicated to open science platforms, research data repositories, and reproducible workflows across disciplines.

conferences.title: European Workshop on Experimental Economics 2023
conferences.subtitle: Behavior, Incentives, and Institutions
conferences.description: A focused workshop on experimental and behavioral economics, including lab and field experiments on cooperation, markets, and public goods.

donation_programs.name: Early Career Research Grants
donation_programs.description: Supports early career researchers with seed funding for independent research projects, pilot studies, and data collection.

donation_programs.name: General Research Fund
donation_programs.description: Provides flexible support for high-priority research initiatives, infrastructure, and cross-cutting programs.

donation_programs.name: Conference and Fieldwork Travel Grants
donation_programs.description: Helps researchers and students cover travel costs for conferences, workshops, and essential fieldwork.

donation_programs.name: Public Outreach and Education Programs
donation_programs.description: Funds public lectures, school outreach, and community engagement activities that communicate research findings.

events.title: Hands-on Data Visualization with Open-Source Tools
events.description: A practical half-day workshop introducing core principles of data visualization using open-source tools such as Python, R, and web-based libraries.

events.title: Designing Interactive Dashboards for Climate Data
events.description: Learn to build intuitive and effective dashboards for communicating climate and energy data to policymakers and the public.

events.title: Advanced Data Visualization for Multidimensional Data
events.description: An advanced full-day workshop on visualizing high-dimensional and longitudinal datasets using interactive techniques.

events.title: Academic Writing for Early Career Researchers
events.description: A workshop focused on structuring articles, responding to reviewer comments, and selecting appropriate journals.

events.title: Webinar: Practical AI Ethics in Research Projects
events.description: This webinar covers practical steps for integrating ethical reflection into AI research workflows, including data governance and bias mitigation.

events.title: Seminar Series: Climate Policy Instruments in Practice
events.description: A seminar discussing carbon pricing, subsidies, and regulatory standards with examples from Europe and North America.

events.title: Grant Writing Bootcamp
events.description: A full-day intensive bootcamp helping researchers develop competitive proposals for national and international funders.

events.title: Machine Learning for Healthcare Bootcamp
events.description: A two-day intensive workshop on building and evaluating ML models for clinical prediction tasks using real-world datasets.

events.title: Renewable Energy Policy Forum
events.description: A one-day forum for policymakers, regulators, and researchers to discuss emerging evidence on renewable energy policy design.

events.title: Webinar: Building FAIR and Reusable Research Datasets
events.description: An online webinar introducing the FAIR principles and practical tools for curating reusable research datasets.

journals.name: Journal of Renewable and Sustainable Energy
Journal of Data Visualization in Science

membership_plans.name: Student Membership
membership_plans.description: Discounted membership for full-time students, providing access to core member benefits and opportunities tailored to early career researchers.

membership_plans.name: Professional Membership
membership_plans.description: Full membership for academics and practitioners, offering comprehensive benefits including leadership opportunities and priority access to programs.
benefits: priority access to workshops and training

membership_plans.name: Institutional Partner Membership
membership_plans.description: Membership for universities, research institutes, and organizations seeking organization-wide benefits and visibility.
benefits: early access to policy briefs and reports

newsletter_topics.name: AI Ethics
newsletter_topics.description: News, events, and new research on the ethics and governance of artificial intelligence.

newsletter_topics.name: Climate Policy
newsletter_topics.description: Updates on climate policy research, renewable energy governance, and related events.

researchers.affiliation: Department of Computer Science, University of Toronto
researchers.biography: Amelia Khan is an associate professor of computer science at the University of Toronto. Her work focuses on machine learning for healthcare, with an emphasis on clinical risk prediction, algorithmic fairness, and deployment of decision support systems in hospitals.

researchers.affiliation: Institute for Environmental Studies, Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam
researchers.biography: Lucas Martínez is a climate policy researcher working on the political economy of energy transitions and the design of carbon pricing instruments in Europe and Latin America.

researchers.affiliation: Department of Information Systems, National University of Singapore
researchers.biography: Priya Narayanan studies the ethics and governance of AI systems, with a focus on transparency, accountability, and impacts on social welfare systems in Asia.

researchers.affiliation: Fraunhofer Institute for Systems and Innovation Research
researchers.biography: Daniel Schmidt is a senior researcher analyzing renewable energy policies, innovation dynamics, and the design of electricity markets that support decarbonization.

researchers.affiliation: School of Information, University of Michigan
researchers.biography: Emma Wilson works at the intersection of data visualization, human-computer interaction, and science communication, developing tools that help researchers and policymakers understand complex datasets.

researchers.affiliation: Climate and Atmosphere Research Center, American University in Cairo
researchers.biography: Youssef El-Masri is a climate scientist specializing in regional climate modeling, extreme events, and the impacts of climate change on water resources in North Africa and the Middle East.

researchers.affiliation: School of Public Health, University of Sydney
researchers.biography: Hannah Lee is a public health researcher using statistical learning and causal inference to evaluate interventions in non-communicable disease prevention.

researchers.affiliation: Center for Social Policy Studies, University of São Paulo
researchers.biography: Carlos Silva researches social protection systems, inequality, and labor markets in Latin America, combining microdata analysis with fieldwork.

researchers.affiliation: Department of Computer Science, University of Cambridge
researchers.biography: Sarah Nguyen develops theoretical foundations for machine learning, with applications to robust optimization and trustworthy AI systems.

researchers.affiliation: Institute for Marine and Antarctic Studies, University of Tasmania
researchers.affiliationDepartment: Institute for Marine and Antarctic Studies
researchers.biography: Mareike Fischer is a marine ecologist focusing on the impacts of climate change on marine biodiversity, fisheries, and conservation planning.

conference_tracks.name: Mitigation & Carbon Pricing
conference_tracks.description: Design and evaluation of climate mitigation policies, including carbon taxes, emissions trading, and sectoral targets.

conference_tracks.name: Renewable Energy Policy & Markets
conference_tracks.description: Policies, regulations, and market designs that accelerate renewable energy deployment.

conference_tracks.name: Adaptation & Resilience
conference_tracks.description: Climate adaptation strategies, resilience planning, and risk governance in diverse regions.

conference_tracks.name: Climate Justice & Equity
conference_tracks.description: Equity, justice, and inclusion in climate policy, with attention to vulnerable communities.

conference_tracks.name: Foundations of AI & Machine Learning
conference_tracks.description: Core machine learning methods, optimization, representation learning, and theory.

conference_tracks.name: Machine Learning for Healthcare
conference_tracks.description: Models and deployments of AI systems in clinical and public health settings.

conference_tracks.name: AI for Climate & Sustainability
conference_tracks.description: Applications of AI and data science to climate modeling, adaptation, and sustainable energy.

conference_tracks.name: AI Ethics, Governance & Policy
conference_tracks.description: Ethical, legal, and policy aspects of AI, including fairness, accountability, and transparency.

conference_tracks.name: Data Infrastructure & Scalable Systems
conference_tracks.description: Platforms, tools, and engineering practices for deploying AI and data science at scale.

conference_tracks.name: Clinical Prediction & Decision Support
conference_tracks.description: Risk prediction models, triage tools, and decision support systems integrated into clinical workflows.

conference_tracks.name: Medical Imaging & Diagnostics
conference_tracks.description: Deep learning for radiology, pathology, and other diagnostic imaging modalities.

conference_tracks.name: Fairness, Ethics & Regulation
conference_tracks.description: Bias, fairness, explainability, and regulatory frameworks for healthcare AI.

conference_tracks.name: Open Science Infrastructures
conference_tracks.description: Repositories, platforms, and tools that enable open and reproducible research.

conference_tracks.name: Policies & Incentives for Openness
conference_tracks.description: Institutional and funder policies, incentives, and metrics for open research practices.

conference_tracks.name: Training & Community Building
conference_tracks.description: Capacity building, training materials, and community-led initiatives in open science.

publications.title: Designing Just Renewable Energy Subsidies: Evidence from the European Union
publications.abstract: This article evaluates the distributional impacts of renewable energy subsidy schemes in the European Union and proposes design principles for more equitable policy instruments.

publications.title: Renewable Energy Policy Mixes in Emerging Economies: Comparative Lessons from Brazil, India, and South Africa
publications.abstract: The paper compares combinations of feed-in tariffs, auctions, and net metering in three emerging economies and assesses their effectiveness in driving renewable capacity additions.

publications.title: Net-zero Pathways and Renewable Energy Policy Interactions
publications.abstract: Using integrated assessment modeling, this study explores how different renewable energy policy packages interact with economy-wide net-zero targets.

publications.title: Grid Integration Challenges for Variable Renewables: Policy Options and System Flexibility
publications.abstract: The article reviews policy instruments that can support system flexibility and reliability under high shares of variable renewable energy.

publications.title: The Political Economy of Carbon Pricing Adoption and Reform
publications.abstract: This paper examines the political determinants of carbon pricing adoption, maintenance, and reform across OECD countries.

publications.title: Operationalizing AI Ethics in Healthcare Machine Learning Projects
publications.abstract: Drawing on case studies of hospital deployments, this article proposes a practical framework for embedding ethical reflection into ML pipeline design.

publications.title: Robust Machine Learning for Early Sepsis Prediction in Heterogeneous Hospitals
publications.abstract: The study evaluates domain generalization techniques for sepsis prediction models across multiple hospital systems.

publications.title: Best Practices for Data Visualization in Interdisciplinary Science Teams
publications.abstract: Through interviews and design studies, this paper distills best practices for visual communication in interdisciplinary research collaborations.
publications.journalName: Journal of Data Visualization in Science

publications.title: Climate-related Financial Risks and the Role of Policy in Steering Investment
publications.abstract: The article reviews emerging approaches to managing climate-related financial risks and the implications for public policy.

publications.title: Interoperability Challenges in Multi-country Electronic Health Record Research
publications.abstract: This study identifies technical and governance barriers to using EHR data across borders for comparative effectiveness research.

publications.title: Renewable Energy Policy and the Just Transition for Fossil Fuel Workers
publications.abstract: Using mixed methods, this paper analyzes how renewable energy policies can be designed to support workers affected by coal phase-out.

publications.title: Urban Solar Policy Innovations: Overcoming Barriers to Rooftop PV Deployment
publications.abstract: The paper evaluates innovative municipal policies to accelerate rooftop solar adoption in dense urban environments.

conference_sessions.title: Opening Keynote: Global Stocktake and Climate Policy
conference_sessions.abstract: A high-level keynote reviewing progress under the Paris Agreement, recent IPCC findings, and implications for national climate policy design.

conference_sessions.title: Panel: Designing Effective Carbon Taxes and Emissions Trading Systems
conference_sessions.abstract: Panelists compare recent reforms to carbon taxes and ETSs, focusing on price stability, distributional impacts, and political feasibility.

conference_sessions.title: Parallel Session: Renewable Energy Auctions for Net-zero
conference_sessions.abstract: Research presentations on the design and performance of renewable energy auctions in Europe, Latin America, and Africa.

conference_sessions.title: Poster Session: Local Climate Action and Adaptation Plans
conference_sessions.abstract: Posters highlighting city- and region-level climate action plans, adaptation strategies, and community engagement approaches.

conference_sessions.title: Climate Adaptation in Coastal Cities
conference_sessions.abstract: Case studies on climate adaptation planning for sea-level rise, storm surges, and flooding in major coastal cities.

conference_sessions.title: Just Transition for Fossil Fuel Regions
conference_sessions.abstract: A multi-disciplinary panel on policies that support workers and communities affected by coal and other fossil fuel phase-outs.

conference_sessions.title: Policies for Scaling Distributed Solar and Storage
conference_sessions.abstract: Empirical and modeling papers on policy instruments that accelerate rooftop solar and behind-the-meter storage deployment.

conference_sessions.title: Integrating Climate and Health Policy
conference_sessions.abstract: This session explores how climate mitigation and adaptation policies interact with public health goals, with a focus on heatwaves and air pollution.

conference_sessions.title: Keynote: Frontiers in Trustworthy Artificial Intelligence
conference_sessions.abstract: A keynote on recent advances in robust, interpretable, and responsible AI, spanning theory and practice.

conference_sessions.title: Session: Causal Representation Learning
conference_sessions.abstract: Research talks on disentangled representations, causal discovery, and their implications for generalization.

conference_sessions.title: Tutorial: Scalable MLOps Pipelines
conference_sessions.abstract: A hands-on tutorial on building scalable, reproducible ML pipelines using modern MLOps tooling.

conference_sessions.title: AI for Climate Risk Modeling
conference_sessions.abstract: Talks on using machine learning to model physical and transition climate risks, including flooding, wildfires, and stranded assets.

conference_sessions.title: Panel: AI for Renewable Energy Systems
conference_sessions.abstract: Industry and academic experts discuss how AI can improve forecasting, control, and planning for renewable-dominated power systems.

conference_sessions.title: Workshop: Building Climate Data Pipelines
conference_sessions.abstract: A practical workshop on curating, processing, and serving large-scale climate datasets for downstream ML applications.

conference_sessions.title: Keynote: The Future of Open Research Infrastructure
conference_sessions.abstract: An overview of emerging infrastructures for data sharing, reproducible workflows, and cross-disciplinary collaboration.

conference_sessions.title: Panel: Open Climate Data for Policy
conference_sessions.abstract: This panel discusses governance and infrastructure for making climate data openly available and usable for policy analysis.

conference_sessions.title: Workshop: Training Researchers in FAIR Data Practices
conference_sessions.abstract: A hands-on workshop introducing the FAIR principles and tools for implementing them in everyday research workflows.

conference_sessions.title: Keynote: Machine Learning for Healthcare at Scale
conference_sessions.abstract: A keynote on deploying ML systems in large health systems, highlighting successes, failures, and open challenges.

conference_sessions.title: Session: Fairness in Clinical Risk Prediction
conference_sessions.abstract: Papers on bias assessment, fairness metrics, and mitigation strategies for clinical risk prediction models.

conference_sessions.title: Panel: Regulatory Pathways for Clinical AI
conference_sessions.abstract: Regulators, clinicians, and developers discuss approval pathways, post-market surveillance, and international harmonization for clinical AI tools.
